'''bamufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:whaanau|whaanau]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-m-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whaanau|whaanau]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| bamufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæmifith|bæmifith]] || [[word:bæmifij|bæmifij]] || [[word:bæmifish|bæmifish]] || [[word:bæmifi|bæmifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bamumufuth|bamumufuth]] || [[word:bamumufuj|bamumufuj]] || [[word:bamumufush|bamumufush]] || [[word:bamumufu|bamumufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bamufuth|bamufuth]] || [[word:bamufuj|bamufuj]] || [[word:bamufush|bamufush]] || [[word:bamufu|bamufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bamuffuth|bamuffuth]] || [[word:bamuffuj|bamuffuj]] || [[word:bamuffush|bamuffush]] || [[word:bamuffuf|bamuffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bamufuthu|bamufuthu]] || [[word:bamufuju|bamufuju]] || [[word:bamufushu|bamufushu]] || [[word:bamufuku|bamufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bamufuth|bamufuth]] || [[word:bamufuj|bamufuj]] || [[word:bamufush|bamufush]] || [[word:bamufu|bamufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bamufuthul|bamufuthul]] || [[word:bamufujul|bamufujul]] || [[word:bamufushul|bamufushul]] || [[word:bamufukul|bamufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bamufuthuthu|bamufuthuthu]] || [[word:bamufujuju|bamufujuju]] || [[word:bamufushushu|bamufushushu]] || [[word:bamufuku|bamufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bamufuthun|bamufuthun]] || [[word:bamufujun|bamufujun]] || [[word:bamufushun|bamufushun]] || [[word:bamufukun|bamufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bamufuthuoro|bamufuthuoro]] || [[word:bamufujuoro|bamufujuoro]] || [[word:bamufushuoro|bamufushuoro]] || [[word:bamufukuoro|bamufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
